lines.en: Wow! Look at all this food!
I know. I do not know what to eat first.
lines.zh: 是啊。我都不知道先吃什么好。

lines.en: Let me get some salad and fruit.
lines.zh: 我先去拿些沙拉和水果。

lines.en: I will get some pizza and fried rice.
Do not take too much at one time.
Why not? It is a buffet!
Because we can go back for more later.
lines.zh: 因为等下还可以再来拿。

lines.en: That makes sense. I will start with a little.
lines.zh: 有道理。我少拿一点开始吧。

lines.en: I already see the cake. I am so excited!
lines.zh: 我已经看到蛋糕了。好激动！
